content:
O ṣeun fun alaye rẹ. Ti iṣiro igbohunsafẹfẹ resonance pyloric ba jẹ apakan boṣewa ti atokọ iṣayẹwo iṣaaju iṣẹ abẹ fun cholecystectomy yiyan ni ile-iṣẹ rẹ, ilana deede ni lati ṣe iṣiro resonance pyloric **ṣaaju akoko idaduro (NPO)**. Eyi jẹ nitori:

1. Awọn ayipada ninu ipo pylorus le yipada lẹhin akoko idaduro, ti o le ni ipa lori deede ati itumọ abajade iṣiro resonance.
2. Ṣiṣe idanwo naa ṣaaju ki alaisan to bẹrẹ NPO n jẹ ki o gba alaye to daju nipa ipo pylorus ni ipo deede ti ounjẹ.

Nitorinaa, iṣiro igbohunsafẹfẹ resonance pyloric yẹ ki o gbe kalẹ **ṣaaju akoko idaduro (
